add-png-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend and insert a PNG image onto page two at specified coordinates, then save the result.

replace-jpeg-image-with-bmp.title: Replace JPEG Image on First Page with BMP
replace-jpeg-image-with-bmp.description: Demonstrates how to replace the first JPEG image on page 1 of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PDF Image
overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent GIF over an existing PNG in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend with CompositingParameters.

add-word-wrapped-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Word‑by‑Word Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
add-word-wrapped-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a FormattedText object and use PdfFileStamp to add a word‑by‑word wrapped footer to every page of a PDF document.

add-promotional-text-to-specific-pdf-pag.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific PDF Pages
add-promotional-text-to-specific-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to insert the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend with FormattedText.

add-multi-line-text-custom-spacing-page-.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Line Spacing to Page 3
add-multi-line-text-custom-spacing-page-.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, create a TextParagraph with custom line spacing, and place it on the left margin of the third page using TextBuilder.

add-background-png-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background PNG to All PDF Pages
add-background-png-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to overlay a full‑page PNG image as a background on every page of an existing PDF.

add-header-image-to-pdf.title: Add Header Image to PDF Documents
add-header-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a header image on every page of one or more PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Logo to PDF Pages
batch-add-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and overlay a company logo PNG in the top‑right corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf facades.

insert-png-signature-on-every-pdf-page.title: Insert PNG Signature on Every PDF Page
insert-png-signature-on-every-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to bind an existing PDF, add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page, and save the modified document.

add-tiff-image-to-last-page.title: Add TIFF Image to Last Page of PDF
add-tiff-image-to-last-page.description: Shows how to use PdfFileMend to insert a TIFF image onto the final page of an existing PDF without altering the existing page content.

add-centered-image-to-pdf.title: Add Centered Image to PDF Using Page Dimensions
add-centered-image-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates retrieving a PDF page's width and height with Aspose.Pdf, calculating coordinates, and placing an image at the center of the page using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.description: The example validates that an image file is of an allowed type (JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, or TIFF) before using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to insert the image into a PDF and save the modified document.

modify-pdf-with-pdffilemend-ensure-close.title: Modify PDF with PdfFileMend and Ensure Proper Closure
modify-pdf-with-pdffilemend-ensure-close.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, optionally adding an image, saving the modified document, and guaranteeing that the PdfFileMend facade is closed in a finally block.

add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to insert multiple images into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend while handling missing files and runtime exceptions for each image.

add-image-and-text-with-audit-logging.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
add-image-and-text-with-audit-logging.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf facades to insert an image and a text annotation into a PDF and logs each operation with timestamp, page number, and identifier for audit purposes.

configure-word-wrapping-bywords.title: Configure Word Wrapping ByWords for PDF Paragraph
configure-word-wrapping-bywords.description: Demonstrates setting the TextParagraph formatting to wrap whole words (ByWords) and adding a long line of text that automatically wraps within a defined rectangle.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert an image onto a chosen page of a PDF document at given rectangle coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-http-response.title: Add Image to PDF and Return via HTTP Response
add-image-http-response.description: Creates a PDF, adds an image using PdfFileMend, saves the result to a memory stream, and writes it to an HTTP response.

async-add-image-to-pdf.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF using PdfFileMend
async-add-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to wrap the synchronous PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run to add an image to a specific PDF page without blocking the calling thread.

extract-images-from-pdf-as-png.title: Extract Images from PDF as PNG Files
extract-images-from-pdf-as-png.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save each one as a separate PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-2-5.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages 2‑5
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-2-5.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a specific page range of a PDF and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page‑Based Naming
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, extract all images from each page, and save them with filenames that include the original PDF name, page number, and image index.

remove-image-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Image from Specific PDF Page
remove-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete a particular image, identified by its object ID, from page four of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document to a new file.

replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.title: Replace Low‑Resolution Images with High‑Resolution PNGs in a PDF
replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page and image in a PDF and replace low‑resolution images with corresponding high‑resolution PNG files using Aspose.Pdf's content editor.

verify-text-position-in-pdf.title: Verify Text Position in PDF
verify-text-position-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a text fragment at specific X/Y coordinates in a PDF and using a TextFragmentAbsorber to extract and validate the text's actual position within a tolerance.

verify-pdf-size-after-image.title: Verify PDF Size Increase After Adding an Image
verify-pdf-size-after-image.description: Creates a sample PDF, adds an image using PdfFileMend, and checks that the file size grows, serving as a simple unit‑test‑like verification.
